issuer_name_as_stated: Gujarat Kidney and Super Speciality Limited
extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each category: I counted only the “Against the Company” and “Against the Subsidiaries” rows for the issuer/group totals, while excluding all “By” rows and excluding promoter/director personal matters. Criminal proceedings against all listed entities are Nil, statutory/regulatory proceedings against the Company and Subsidiaries are Nil, and tax proceedings against the Company and Subsidiary are 10 and 7 respectively, for 17 tax proceedings; promoter and director tax rows were not counted. The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated Total of ₹6.40 lakhs as of September 30, 2024, converted to ₹0.064 crore, rather than summed from line items. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage is disclosed; the available percentages concern other operating metrics and payer categories, not customer concentration. Litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ lakhs; ₹46.49 lakhs against the Company plus ₹0.10 lakhs against the Subsidiary equals ₹46.59 lakhs, or ₹4.659 crore, using 1 crore = 100 lakhs.
